title: Mayor's delight
description: An economic mod that adds two new villagers!
body: **The Mayor's Delight** is an economic mod that adds two villagers: a builder and a jeweler. Colorful amethysts and their smooth variations also appear in the game. With their help, you can make staves with cool abilities and more will be added soon!![Crystals](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/J4icVTyI/images/3d50e46f94ba55ae2fe37d071f069e725b95e53e.png)![Jeweker](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/J4icVTyI/images/1acf15858cec431a2ca3208501d94347860c3c16.png)
